title: Add debug logging to fetch flow
description: Add print/log statements in fetch_records() and get_adjustments() to show actual period values being sent to API

files.change: Add append_log() call showing period_month and period_year values before creating query
Add debug print of query.params() before making API call in get_adjustments()

criteria: Debug output shows actual period_month and period_year values when 'Fetch / Refresh Data' button clicked
Python appends log showing period values in UI log area
